basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Associate/ Research Associate/ Senior Research Assistant/ Research Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Associate / Research Associate / Senior Research Assistant / Research Assistant
basic_details.short_information: IIM Lucknow is recruiting one contractual research position (Senior Research Associate / Research Associate / Senior Research Assistant / Research Assistant) with Economics qualification. Last date: 10 July 2026.

qualification.details: Desirable Qualifications: | Proficiency in Python, E-views, Stata, MATLAB, R Experience in data mining, cleaning, and handling large datasets Excellent Applied Econometrics and statistical skills Proficiency in English (spoken & written) Research interest in Monetary-Macro, International, Labour, or Environmental Economics

vacancy_details.details: One Position: Senior Research Associate / Research Associate / Senior Research Assistant / Research Assistant (depending on qualification and experience).

selection_process: Applications will be scrutinized. Shortlisted candidates will be called for personal interview and verification of original documents. Final selection based on qualifications
how_to_apply: Submit your application by filling the Google Form available at: https://forms.gle/33qwESA3n57RvaWe8
Last date: 10 July 2026 (Friday) up to 05:30 PM.
No other mode of application will be accepted.
important_instructions: The position is purely contractual for initial 6 months (extendable). Incomplete or ineligible applications will be rejected. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Only selected candidates will be intimated.

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIM Lucknow is recruiting one contractual research position (Senior Research Associate / Research Associate / Senior Research Assistant / Research Assistant) with Economics qualification. Last date: 10 July 2026.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_lucknow_i: Senior Research Associate / Research Associate / Senior Research Assistant / Research Assistant
Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month (consolidated) + HRA

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: One Position: Senior Research Associate / Research Associate / Senior Research Assistant / Research Assistant (depending on qualification and experience).

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Desirable Qualifications: Proficiency in Python, E-views, Stata, MATLAB, R Experience in data mining, cleaning, and handling large datasets Excellent Applied Econometrics and statistical skills Proficiency in English (spoken & written) Research interest in Monetary-Macro, International, Labour, or Environmental Economics

rows.essential_qualification: Ph.D. in Economics + 3 years post-Ph.D. experience + 1 research paper
Ph.D. in Economics + 0-2 years post-Ph.D. experience + 1 research paper
Master’s in Economics + 2 years relevant experience

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Job Responsibilities
content_sections.text: Cleaning and analysing large primary and secondary datasets Actively contribute to ongoing research work Reviewing critical and scholarly literature Assisting in teaching/academic activities

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Applications will be scrutinized. Shortlisted candidates will be called for personal interview and verification of original documents. Final selection based on qualifications, experience, and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Submit your application by filling the Google Form available at: https://forms.gle/33qwESA3n57RvaWe8 Last date: 10 July 2026 (Friday) up to 05:30 PM. No other mode of application will be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely contractual for initial 6 months (extendable). Incomplete or ineligible applications will be rejected. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Only selected candidates will be intimated.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Lucknow Research Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 10 July 2026 (up to 05:30 PM).

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Research Associate at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: Consolidated emoluments range from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month + HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for Senior Research Associate at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: Ph.D. in Economics with 3 years post-Ph.D. experience and at least one research paper.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for IIM Lucknow Economics Research Position 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the Google Form at https://forms.gle/33qwESA3n57RvaWe8 by 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What software skills are required for IIM Lucknow Research Associate?
faq.answer: Proficiency in Python, E-views, Stata, MATLAB, or R is necessary.

faq.question: Q6. Is Ph.D. mandatory for Research Assistant position at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: No, Master’s in Economics is sufficient for Research Assistant level.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the contractual position at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: Initial period of six months, extendable based on performance.

faq.question: Q8. What are the preferred research areas for IIM Lucknow Research Position?
faq.answer: Monetary-Macro, International, Labour, and Environmental Economics.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any interview for IIM Lucknow Research Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for personal interview.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are needed for IIM Lucknow Research Position application?
faq.answer: Updated CV along with the online Google Form submission.
